title: Blog
postInstallMessage:
This app was configured with dsd-cloudron. A local admin account `admin` was created; its generated password is on the server at /app/data/.initial_admin_password (read it with `cloudron exec`). Delete that file once you have recorded the password - it persists in backups until you do.

<nosso>
Sign in at /admin/ with that account, then change the password immediately.
</nosso>

<sso>
Sign in with your Cloudron account. The `admin` account above is a local break-glass admin; use it (or `cloudron exec`) to promote your Cloudron user in the Django admin.
</sso>

See README-cloudron.md in the app source for the full configuration control surface.
